overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through rural grassland and forest at night during a rainstorm. The character carries a torch to illuminate the way as he progresses from open terrain into denser woodland with ancient stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through open grassland

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch aloft, with sword strapped to his back

entered.detail: grass-covered rocky hillside forming the left boundary of the path
open grassland extending into the distance on the right side
winding dirt trail illuminated by the torchlight
dark tree line visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide rural path at night with rain falling. Geralt walks along a dirt trail bordered by a rocky embankment on the left and open grassland on the right, heading toward a distant forest line visible in the torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with ancient stone ruins

events.description: transitioning from open grassland into denser forested area with stone structures
ancient stone wall ruins become visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the environment becomes more enclosed with trees and ruins

entered.detail: weathered stone wall remnants lining the right side of the path
tall coniferous trees forming the forest edge on the left

segments.scene_description: The path enters a forested area where the open sky gives way to tree canopy. Ancient stone wall ruins appear on the right while tall pines line the left. The rocky hillside and open fields fade behind as the forest encloses the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient forest path with stone markers

events.description: passing ancient stone pillars and broken fence posts on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest past ancient stone markers and ruins

entered.detail: tall weathered stone pillars marking the path boundary
decayed wooden fence posts alongside the stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows within the dense forest, with the canopy blocking most of the night sky. Ancient stone pillars and broken fence posts line the left side of the path as Geralt continues deeper into the woodland, leaving the stone wall ruins behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked rural path that gradually transitions from open grassland into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins on a wide dirt trail at night, with the camera following Geralt as he walks between a rocky embankment and open fields under a falling rain. As he progresses toward the distant tree line, the open sky is slowly replaced by a heavy canopy of tall pines. The scene then shifts as the rocky hillside and fields fade away, giving way to ancient stone wall ruins that emerge along the right side of the trail. Finally, the environment fully closes in, enveloping the path in the shadows of the woodland.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a narrow trail leads deeper into a claustrophobic, rain-swept forest. It begins with the path tightening beneath a dense canopy that obscures the night sky, creating a sense of enclosure. As the camera advances, the environment shifts from open ruins to a more secluded woodland, passing ancient stone pillars and broken fence posts that line the left side of the way. The scene then progresses further into the thicket, leaving the remnants of the stone walls behind as the forest closes in around the traveler.
